message:
test(storage): add SQLite caching equivalence tests (16pz)

Added 8 tests verifying IndexingCache produces identical state to direct
ensure_* calls:
- Data integrity tests (cached vs direct DB state comparison)
- ID consistency tests (stable IDs across lookups)
- Cache behavior tests (hits/misses tracking, clear(), is_enabled())
- Stress tests (100 conversations, 10 agents, 50 workspaces)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
